productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men Court Lounge Brown Casual Shoes
description: Blending classic sportswear and casual characteristics, the Court Lounge from adidas originals has a cool design, making it a top favourite.UpperFull grain leather upper with adidas patented 3-Stripes on the sides of the midfoot and has overlocked panel stitch detailing Lacing system for a snug, customised FitMildly padded collar and tongue with a textile inner lining for comfort and optimum fitLeather piping along the back collar for enhanced durabilityMildly padded footbed for all-day comfortHard back heel to lock the foot in placeMidsoleMoulded midsole detailing for vintage style and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with diagonal grooves for absolute durability, grip and tractionshoe careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditionerDo not store in direct sunlight
